club.name: Centennial Leo Club of Richmond College
club.tagline: Empowering youth to serve. Building leaders who make a difference.
club.motto: One Team · One Dream · One Aim
club.location: Richmond Hill Road, Galle, Sri Lanka
club.about1: The Centennial Leo Club of Richmond College was founded in 2016 under Leo District 306 A2 and is now proudly part of Leo District 306 D8 following the 2025 redistricting. Through 9 generations of presidents and countless community projects, we continue to uphold the Leo values of Leadership, Experience, and Opportunity.
club.about2: Our club has earned district recognition every year since foundation, including being named Most Outstanding School Leo Club and receiving multiple Presidential awards — a testament to the dedication of every Leo member.

projects.title: Scholarship Support Drive
projects.description:
The Scholarship Support Drive is an initiative dedicated to empowering students by providing financial assistance and educational resources to those in need. This program aims to support talented and deserving individuals who face economic challenges, ensuring that financial limitations do not hinder their academic ambitions.

Through this drive, contributions are collected from generous donors, organizations, and well-wishers to fund scholarships, school supplies, and essential learning materials. The initiative not only promotes equal access to education but also encourages a culture of giving and community support.

By investing in education today, the Scholarship Support Drive strives to build a brighter, more knowledgeable, and capable future generation.

projects.title: Green Richmond Initiative
projects.description: A large-scale tree planting campaign within the Richmond College grounds and surrounding community areas.

projects.title: Blood Donation Campaign
projects.description: Organizing annual blood donation events in partnership with the National Blood Transfusion Service of Sri Lanka.

projects.title: Rich Hearts
projects.description: Award-winning international joint project connecting Leo clubs across borders for a shared humanitarian cause.

projects.title: Slay the Dread
projects.description: Best Research Project award winner — a youth mental health awareness and support initiative.

projects.title: Nethata Saviyak
projects.description: A visionary project supporting differently-abled youth, recognized at the district level.

newsletter.title: Leo Voice – Issue 01
newsletter.description: Club reactivation edition — introducing the 2025/26 executive committee and upcoming project pipeline.

affiliatedBodies.label: Governing Body
affiliatedBodies.title: Leo Multiple District 306
affiliatedBodies.description: Leo Multiple District 306 encompasses the Leo Clubs across Sri Lanka, fostering youth leadership and service excellence. As part of this prestigious network, we connect with Leo Clubs nationwide, sharing resources, best practices, and collaborative opportunities.

affiliatedBodies.label: Governing Body
affiliatedBodies.title: Leo District 306 D8
affiliatedBodies.description: Leo District 306 D8 is our immediate governing body, overseeing Leo Clubs in our region with dedicated support and leadership. Through District D8, we participate in inter-club activities, conventions, and leadership training programs.

affiliatedBodies.label: Governing Body
affiliatedBodies.title: Lions Clubs International
affiliatedBodies.description: The world's largest service club organization, providing global opportunities for our youth to serve, lead, and connect.

affiliatedBodies.label: Institution
affiliatedBodies.title: Richmond College
affiliatedBodies.description: Our esteemed alma mater and backing institution, fostering generations of young leaders who bring pride to the college through dedicated community service.
